creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Veniamin Gvozdikov <g.veniamin@googlemail.com> wrote:

> I'm upgraded my fbsd box and try build in jail (freebsd 9.1 i386), but
> I haven't similiar build errors. Please give additional infromation by
> your system:
>
> - Version of freebsd box.


Hello Veniamin,


What is "freebsd box"?
My version is (uname -a)

FreeBSD ahab.tihnet 9.1-STABLE FreeBSD 9.1-STABLE #0: Fri Feb  8 23:13:06 CET 2013     root@ahab.tihnet:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/BEASTIE  i386



> - List installed ports with versions.
> - make.conf.


make.conf
,----
| CUPS_OVERWRITE_BASE=yes	
| NO_LPR=yes	
| WITH_CUPS=yes	
| WITH_OPENSSL_BASE=yes
| 
| OVERRIDE_LINUX_BASE_PORT=f10
| OVERRIDE_LINUX_NONBASE_PORTS=f10
| 
| WITH_PKGNG=yes
| # added by use.perl 2012-11-19 19:49:52
| PERL_VERSION=5.16.2
`----
